title: Integrate AI Chatbot and Voice Assistant into DSOUZA BANK Header

requirements.text: Restructure the top-right section of the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) to display all five controls in a single horizontal row with 16–20px equal gaps, vertically centered, and consistent icon sizing. The order must be: [ Font Size Toggle ] [ Language Selector ] [ Accessibility Icon ] [ AI Chatbot ] [ Voice Assistant ]. Remove any existing standalone floating placements of the chatbot or voice assistant from the header area and consolidate them here.

quotes: Place BOTH AI Chatbot and Voice Assistant inside the top-right header section, beside the existing icons
ORDER (Right side header layout): [ Font Size ] [ Language ] [ Accessibility ] [ AI Chatbot ] [ Voice Assistant ]
Maintain equal spacing (16–20px gap between icons)

acceptanceCriteria: All five controls appear in the correct left-to-right order in the header's right section
Gaps between every adjacent control are equal (16–20px)
All icons and labels are vertically centered within the header bar
Icons are the same visual size across all five controls
No duplicate or floating instances of the chatbot or voice assistant exist outside the header

requirements.text: Add or update an inline AI Chatbot trigger button in the header labeled 'DSOUZA AI' with a small chat/bot icon and the text label beneath or beside it. When clicked, open a slide-down or side panel using glassmorphism styling (frosted glass background, subtle border, backdrop blur). The panel must use deep black readable text (#111111), support language selection among English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, and Tamil, include an adjustable font size control inside the panel, and include a Senior Mode toggle that enlarges text and increases contrast within the panel. The panel must close when the trigger is clicked again or when clicking outside.

quotes: When clicked: Slide-down or side panel opens
Multi-language support (English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Tamil)

acceptanceCriteria: Header shows a chat/bot icon with label 'DSOUZA AI'
Clicking the button opens a glassmorphism-styled panel (backdrop-blur, frosted glass appearance)
All text inside the panel renders in #111111
Panel includes a language selector with English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, and Tamil options
Panel includes a font size adjustment control that resizes text within the panel
Panel includes a Senior Mode toggle that visibly increases font size and contrast when enabled
Clicking the trigger again or clicking outside the panel closes it

requirements.text: Add or update an inline Voice Assistant trigger button in the header showing a microphone icon with the label 'Voice'. The button must display a subtle Royal Indigo (#4B0082 or equivalent) glow. When the voice assistant is active (listening), apply a visible pulse animation to the microphone icon. Clicking the button opens a compact dropdown for voice interaction that supports speech-to-text (capturing user speech) and text-to-speech (reading responses aloud) using the Web Speech API, operating in the currently selected app language.
acceptanceCriteria: Header shows a microphone icon with the label 'Voice'
Button has a subtle Royal Indigo glow effect in its default state
When listening, the microphone icon shows a visible CSS pulse animation
Clicking the button opens a compact dropdown panel for voice interaction
The component uses the Web Speech API for speech recognition and synthesis
Voice operations respect the currently selected app language

requirements.text: Apply visual refinements across the header and both new panels: ensure all heading text is #000000, all body text is #111111 (no faded grey text), add subtle hover animations (e.g., scale or opacity transition) to all five header controls, and maintain a premium fintech aesthetic with breathing space between elements so the header does not appear crowded.

quotes: Ensure header does not look crowded
Icons should be clean and minimal

acceptanceCriteria: All heading text in the header and panels is #000000
All body/label text in the header and panels is #111111 with no faded grey
Each of the five header controls has a subtle hover animation (scale or opacity transition)
Header maintains breathing space and does not appear visually crowded at standard viewport widths
Overall header retains a premium, minimal fintech appearance

constraints: Do NOT redesign or restructure the overall page layout — only adjust header placement and presentation
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing header functionality (navigation links, scroll-aware styling, mobile menu toggle, life stage toggle)
nonGoals: Redesigning any page sections outside the header
Adding a backend for chatbot responses (use frontend-only mock/static responses)
Replacing or removing the existing FloatingChatbot or VoiceAssistant component logic — integrate or adapt it into the header
Changing the overall color theme or brand identity of DSOUZA BANK
